headline: T. Rowe Price Group Shareholders Back Board as ETF Assets Top $25 Billion
summary: T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) held its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders virtually, with Chair, CEO and President Robert Sharps presiding over the proceedings.
